paper_title: Reinvestigation of Palynological Slides from Brillesø Site

methods.description: This method involves the collection and preparation of palynological samples from the Brillesø site for the purpose of reinvestigating previously studied slides and complementing them with new samples.

steps.description: GGU samples 184002 were collected from Brillesø locality 1 (B1); while GGU samples 184003 and 184004 were collected from Brillesø locality 2 (B2).
steps.searchable_summary: collect samples from specified localities at Brillesø site

steps.description: Newly processed samples were handpicked following gentle acid-maceration of rock samples.
steps.searchable_summary: process and handpick samples using acid-maceration

methods.description: This method involves the classification of handpicked and conventional acritarchs from North Greenland to evaluate taxonomic boundaries and assess morphological variations.

steps.description: Handpicked and conventional acritarchs were first classified according to established form taxonomy.
Morphological variations within and between conventional form taxa were then assessed to define population-based categories.
steps.searchable_summary: assess morphological variations to define categories

steps.description: Intermediate morphologies that occupy morphospace between multiple closely similar taxa were assigned to an established taxon upon critical analysis of their character combinations.
steps.searchable_summary: assign intermediate morphologies to taxa based on character analysis

steps.description: Intermediate forms between two strongly distinct taxa were more readily classified using open nomenclature.
steps.searchable_summary: classify intermediate forms using open nomenclature

methods.description: This method involves counting specimens on palynological slides to assess the relative abundance of recovered taxa and morphotypes.

steps.description: About 200 specimens were counted on each of the nine palynological slides to assess the relative abundance of recovered taxa and morphotypes.
steps.searchable_summary: count specimens on slides to assess taxa abundance
